description_long: This is a large, heavy-duty sledgehammer with a robust, double-sided head made of dark, rough stone or metal, featuring prominent angular facets and metallic spikes protruding from both ends. The head is reinforced with a central metallic band adorned with rivets and a brown, possibly leather-wrapped, section at the core. The handle is long, dark brown, and appears to be made of wood, with a segmented, ergonomic design and metallic accents at both ends. The grip section is contoured for better handling, and the base of the handle is capped with a decorative metallic pommel. The overall construction suggests a tool designed for maximum impact and durability, suitable for heavy demolition or ceremonial use. The hammer's rugged, medieval-inspired aesthetic is accentuated by its spiked head and reinforced structure.
description: A large, spiked sledgehammer with a dark, faceted head and a long, contoured wooden handle with metallic accents. The design is rugged and reinforced, evoking a medieval or fantasy style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the spiked, double-sided head and the central metallic band with rivets.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the square face of the hammer head and the protruding spikes, with the handle appearing narrow.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the opposite side of the spiked head and the handle's full length.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows the square face and spikes, similar to view 1 but from the other side.
attribute_handle_type: Long, contoured wooden handle with segmented ergonomic grip and metallic pommel; appears textured for secure handling.
attribute_head_type: Double-sided sledgehammer head with angular, faceted faces and metallic spikes protruding from both ends; reinforced with a central metallic band and rivets.
